channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Prime Day TV Deals to Watch For
item.description: Prime Day TV deals start June 23. Experts highlight the best OLED, QLED, and budget models to consider and what to avoid.

item.title: Common Issues with Inline-6 Engines
item.description: Inline-six engines face issues like camshaft flex, uneven air/fuel distribution, and timing chain failures. Understanding these can help buyers make informed choices.

item.title: Davenport Sweeps MLRA at Salina
item.description: Davenport secures another MLRA sweep at Salina, showcasing dominance in Dirt Late Model racing. The event highlights the competitive spirit of the sport.

item.title: Ferrari's Iconic Designs Through the Years
item.description: Explore 80 years of Ferrari designs, from classic to modern. The blend of style and innovation defines the brand's legacy.

item.title: Inside a 10Gbit SFP+ Network Adapter
item.description: A detailed autopsy reveals insights into a 10Gbit SFP+ network adapter. The analysis highlights the evolution of consumer networking technology.

item.title: Morristown Bochurim Honor Menahel
item.description: Students surprise their menahel with a complete Hebrew ArtScroll Shas during an awards ceremony, showing appreciation for his dedication.

item.title: Honda S2000's Manual Gearbox Engineering
item.description: The Honda S2000's manual gearbox is celebrated for its precise engineering, offering a unique driving experience that enthusiasts cherish.

item.title: Minisforum's New MS-03 Mini-PC
item.description: Minisforum showcases the MS-03 mini-PC at Computex 2026, featuring Intel's Panther Lake platform. It's designed to enhance performance and efficiency.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Phones Get Free Upgrade
item.description: Samsung is rolling out One UI 9 to more Galaxy devices, offering users the latest Android 17 features and improvements.

item.title: Gigabyte Supports Ryzen 9 PRO 9965X3D
item.description: Gigabyte confirms support for AMD's Ryzen 9 PRO 9965X3D on its X870 AORUS TACHYON ICE motherboard, expanding CPU compatibility.

item.title: Witcher 4 Should Learn from Witcher 2
item.description: The Witcher 4 needs to focus on impactful decisions, drawing inspiration from The Witcher 2's narrative choices for a richer gameplay experience.

item.title: Nothing Cancels CMF Phone Pro 2
item.description: Rising RAM costs lead to the cancellation of the CMF Phone Pro 2, highlighting challenges in tech production.

item.title: X-Files Museum's Top Discoveries
item.description: Explore 10 fascinating discoveries from the X-Files museum, showcasing props and memorabilia from the iconic series.

item.title: New GTA 6 Screenshot Released
item.description: Rockstar Games unveils a new screenshot of Grand Theft Auto 6, fueling excitement among fans eagerly awaiting the game.

item.title: Top-Rated 65-Inch TV Under $1,000
item.description: Consumer Reports names the best 65-inch TV under $1,000 for 2026, guiding buyers towards quality options without breaking the bank.
